title: anisotome dissecta
intro: Anisotome dissecta, also known as dissected anisotome or New Zealand anisotome, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family that is native to New Zealand. Traditionally, it has been used in medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Anisotome dissecta include relief from pain, reduction of inflammation, and potential antimicrobial effects, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves can be dried and infused as a tea, or used as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
